title: Mazars Comment A Us Debt Default Could Happen What Then
section_path: Mazars Comment A Us Debt Default Could Happen What Then
section_path_text: Mazars Comment A Us Debt Default Could Happen What Then
summary:
Main
By George Lagarias
The three things I would tell my clients this week:
A US debt default is a real, non-zero probability. Partisanship appears to be at an all-time high, skewing legislative priorities away from cooperation and towards acrimony. In 2011, when a debt default was threatened, US stocks fell by 16%.

children.title: A US debt default could happen. What then?
section_path: A US debt default could happen. What then?
children.section_path_text: A US debt default could happen. What then?
children.summary: The inevitable US debt ceiling drama is upon us. With the earnings season now mostly behind us, the eyes of investors will inevitably turn towards Washington DC.
